subcodes.first_line: O Amata’l-Bahá! With utmost ease I arrived in New York. However, I was not for a moment free of My thoughts for all of you
subcodes.subjects: @sacrifice of self; mystery of sacrifice, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness, @consolation and comfort, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @travels to the West by Abdu'l-Baha
